See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 22822 => 'Lome', 22823 => 'Maritime region', 22824 => 'Plateaux region', 22825 => 'Central region', 22826 => 'Kara region', 22827 => 'Savannah region', ];
